Code fragment: public final TableField<TransfersRecord, Timestamp> TRANSFERED_AT = createField(DSL.name("TRANSFERED_AT"), org.jooq.impl.SQLDataType.TIMESTAMP.precision(6).defaultValue(org.jooq.impl.DSL.field("CURRENT_TIMESTAMP", org.jooq.impl.SQLDataType.TIMESTAMP)), this, "");
Explanation: The TRANSFERED_AT column has a default value but is marked as NULLABLE, which means it can never be NULL in practice since it defaults to CURRENT_TIMESTAMP. Consider adding .nullable(false) to the column definition to explicitly mark it as NOT NULL.
